creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Looks good except, the port needs a PORTREVISION bump. I'll update your commit to do that.

Remember, a PORTREVISION bump is needed any time the resulting package changes due to the patch. This patch alters the man pages. Therefore the PORTREVISION needs a bump to reflect that the binary package built by the port will also change; the man pages have changed.

I'll make the changes and push the commit this weekend.
